nodes.label: AI as research and terminology aid
nodes.label_negative: Struggling to find obscure facts and terms
nodes.grounding_span: AI can make it a lot easier to find obscure facts

nodes.label: AI as coach and sounding board for process
nodes.grounding_span: I use it as a sounding board

nodes.label: AI providing tailored, novel suggestions
nodes.grounding_span: something genuinely novel... catered to my very specific situation

nodes.label: AI as tool for life/work balance
nodes.grounding_span: looking for ways to get more leisure time in, to help avoid burnout

nodes.label: AI involvement in core creative work (prose, ideation)
nodes.grounding_span: I don't want any sort of collaborator... The whole point of writing is to do it myself

nodes.label: AI as creative force multiplier in new artforms
nodes.grounding_span: AI becomes a tool for creativity... force multiplier

nodes.label: AI content restrictions and filters
nodes.grounding_span: I kept running into problems where the AI was uncomfortable with the subject matter

nodes.label: Authentic human connection in art
nodes.grounding_span: people enjoy stories because they are connecting with other people

nodes.label: Personal creative autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: The whole point of writing is to do it myself

nodes.label: Productivity and work-life balance
nodes.grounding_span: write faster, so I can have more time for other important things

nodes.label: Novelty and tailored solutions
nodes.grounding_span: something genuinely novel... catered to my very specific situation

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for research and terminology
nodes.grounding_span: AI can make it a lot easier to find obscure facts

nodes.label: Frustration with generic AI advice
nodes.grounding_span: very regimented suggestions, paint by numbers things that I've tried already

nodes.label: Rejection of AI for core creative work
nodes.grounding_span: I don't want any sort of collaborator

nodes.label: Openness to AI as creative partner in new media
nodes.grounding_span: I can envision a future where whole new artforms appear that almost require AI

nodes.label: Frustration with AI content filters
nodes.grounding_span: I kept running into problems where the AI was uncomfortable with the subject matter

nodes.label: Detailed upfront contextualization
nodes.grounding_span: I'll usually do a really long first prompt, lay out my problem in great detail

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: there's usually a certain amount of back and forth with these conversations
